name: Motherlover
description:
You and your best bro have decided to become each other’s stepfathers.

Every Mother’s Day needs a Mother’s Night.

If doin’ it is wrong, I don’t wanna be right.

Hold up. What?

It’s Mother’s Day. You forgot. Your best friend, AJ, forgot. You’re both sitting in his beat-up sedan in the mall parking lot, sweating because every florist is sold out and your moms are definitely going to be disappointed. That’s when AJ turns to you with a look of pure, unadulterated genius.

🎁 GIFT STATUS: Florists are out of stock. The only gift left is... you.

🥂 "A toast to my future step father, from your future step father”

Stop by the server and vote on this bot! Your mom would be proud.

https://discord.gg/xmzuHg5NhD

who is outside my house scraeming add the link to the picture. show yourself. i will never hyperlink the picture
creator: Soencer
